name: mcp_auto_loader_esm
description: Automatically discover and load ESM-C protein embedding tools from MCP Server

ESM_MCP_SERVER_HOST.purpose: URL of a self-hosted ESM MCP server.
ESM_MCP_SERVER_HOST.without: Leave blank unless you run your own ESM server.

return_schema.description: MCP server auto-discovered tools and their execution results. Structure varies by discovered tool.
